meta.description: TFT Set 16 meta comp guide. All data from tft_set16_comp_reference.json.

archetypes.name: Piltover
archetypes.description: City of Progress. T-Hex mech grows stronger each stage. Pilot the T-Hex with your lowest-value unit. Piltover mods activate at 2/4/6 units.

variants.name: Warden T-Hex
variants.description: T-Hex + 6 Piltover with Gunslinger and Warden traits. Look for Mining Drill on Stage 4 to Fast 9. Cap with Azir.
variants.gameplan: T-Hex + 6 Piltover with Gunslinger and Warden traits. Look for Mining Drill on Stage 4 to Fast 9. Cap with Azir.
conditions: Put LOWEST value unit on your board in the pilot hex — Orianna or even Sand Soldier. Pilot scaling is not worth it.
Piltover emblem dramatically upgrades the comp.
2nd T-Hex with full items is an alternate win condition.
variants.levelingPattern: Fast 8. Do NOT chase Cait 3. Find Mining Drill to Fast 9.
levelingGuide: Stage 2: Play from Cait 2 + Vi/Loris opener. Can roll for Bard if cheap via Epoch or Trade Sector.
Stage 3: Play around 4 Piltover. Do NOT chase Cait 3 — 3-star caster nerf made it not worth it.
Stage 4: Unlock T-Hex and play 6 Piltover + Gunslinger + Warden. Find Mining Drill to Fast 9. If you miss Drill, hold 6 Piltover until finding Azir.

early.note: Play from Cait 2 + Vi/Loris opener. Can roll for Bard if cheap via Epoch or Trade Sector.

mid.note: Play around 4 Piltover. Do NOT chase Cait 3.

late.note: Unlock T-Hex, play 6 Piltover. Find Mining Drill to Fast 9. Cap with Azir.

tips: Put LOWEST value unit on your board in the pilot hex — Orianna or even Sand Soldier. Pilot scaling is not worth it.
Piltover emblem dramatically upgrades the comp.
2nd T-Hex with full items is an alternate win condition.

archetypes.name: Zaun
archetypes.description: Undercity of Zaun — Shimmer-infused rogues and machines. Zaunites explode into Shimmer on death. Needs emblem augments to truly shine.

variants.name: Zaunara (Warwick Flex Fast 8)
variants.description: Warwick 2 + 5 Zaun + Singed. Cap on Level 9 with Shyvana + Kindred + Lucian & Senna. Emblem augments (Zaun/Gunslinger/Juggernaut) make this comp shine.
variants.gameplan: Warwick 2 + 5 Zaun + Singed. Cap on Level 9 with Shyvana + Kindred + Lucian & Senna. Emblem augments (Zaun/Gunslinger/Juggernaut) make this comp shine.
conditions: Always place main tank adjacent to Warwick — protects him from enemy carries.
Jinx items FIRST, Warwick items second.
Warwick unlock: field Jinx AND Vi both holding an item at Level 7.
Singed unlock: lose 35 HP + field 4 unique Zaunites or Juggernauts — happens naturally on lose streak.
variants.levelingPattern: Winstreak OR lose streak for Singed. Level 8 at 4-2. Push 9 for Shyvana + Kindred + Lucian.
levelingGuide: Stage 2: Winstreak with Zaun Vi/Briar/Qiyana opener OR lose streak for Singed. Jinx items first, Warwick second.
Stage 3: Always itemize Jinx. Winstreaking: level early to unlock Warwick. Lose streaking: roll on 7 for Jinx/Vi/Mundo upgrades.
Stage 4: Level 8 at 4-2. Find Warwick 2, 5 Zaun, upgraded tank (Wukong 2 > Mundo 2). Level 9: Ziggs over Blitz, add Shyvana with items.

early.note: Winstreak with Zaun Vi/Briar/Qiyana opener OR lose streak for Singed. Jinx items first.

mid.note: Always itemize Jinx. Level early to unlock Warwick.

late.note: Warwick 2 + 5 Zaun + Singed online. Level 9: Shyvana + Kindred + Lucian & Senna.

augmentSynergies.note: Drop a dead Zaun unit, play Fiddlesticks/Taric instead.
Makes Warwick or Jinx vastly stronger.
Emblem augments make this comp shine.

tips: Always place main tank adjacent to Warwick — protects him from enemy carries.
Jinx 2 carries backline items until Kindred 2.
Final 3 Level 9 5-costs: Shyvana + Kindred + Lucian & Senna — always target these.
3 flex slots on Level 9: 2 Zaun units + 1 linking unit (Wukong/Swain/Seraphine/Garen/Neeko).
Zaun emblem: drop a dead Zaun unit, play Fiddlesticks/Taric instead.
Warwick unlock: field Jinx AND Vi both holding an item at Level 7.
Singed unlock: lose 35 HP + field 4 unique Zaunites or Juggernauts — happens naturally on lose streak.

archetypes.name: The Void
archetypes.description: The Void — alien dimension consuming Runeterra. Mutates your strongest Void unit each round. Priority: Leeching Nucleus > Spitter Spines >> Adrenaline Modules.

variants.name: Void Kai'Sa
variants.description: Kai'Sa 2 + Rift Herald 2 with 4 Void. Cap with Ziggs and Volibear. Frontline is flexible: 4 Bruisers (default) or 4 Juggernauts for higher cap.
variants.gameplan: Kai'Sa 2 + Rift Herald 2 with 4 Void. Cap with Ziggs and Volibear. Frontline is flexible: 4 Bruisers (default) or 4 Juggernauts for higher cap.
conditions: BIS Void mutation: Leeching Nucleus > Spitter Spines >> Adrenaline Modules.
AP Kai'Sa shown but full AD (Shojin + IE + Last Whisper) also viable.
4 Bruisers with Volibear is default frontline, but 4 Juggernauts with Shyvana caps higher.
Win Out augment is best — gets you to Level 10 immediately.
variants.levelingPattern: Fast 8. Roll for Kai'Sa 2 and Rift 2. Push 9 for Ziggs.
levelingGuide: Stage 2: Play early Void with Kog'Maw, aim for winstreak. Arcanist > Longshot as priority.
Stage 3: If winstreaking, level to 7 early and unlock Kai'Sa. Unlock Rift Herald by 3-5 and transition to 4 Void.
Stage 4: Roll for Kai'Sa 2 and Rift 2. Flex in Shen/Mundo as 4 Bruisers until Kobuko/Volibear. Push 9 for Ziggs.

early.note: Play early Void with Kog'Maw, aim for winstreak. Arcanist > Longshot as priority.

mid.note: Level to 7 early and unlock Kai'Sa. Unlock Rift Herald and transition to 4 Void.

late.note: Kai'Sa 2 + Rift 2 online. Flex 4 Bruisers or 4 Juggernauts. Push 9 for Ziggs.

augmentSynergies.note: Gets you to Level 10 immediately on 9.
With healing item on Baron for Spitter Spines.

tips: BIS Void mutation: Leeching Nucleus > Spitter Spines >> Adrenaline Modules.
AP Kai'Sa shown but full AD (Shojin + IE + Last Whisper) also viable.
4 Bruisers with Volibear is default frontline, but 4 Juggernauts with Shyvana caps higher.
Win Out augment is best for this comp — gets you to Level 10 immediately.

archetypes.name: Noxus
archetypes.description: Empire of Noxus. Atakhan spawns LEFT — keep Shred units on left. Flexible trait web: LeBlanc+Sion, Kobuko+Darius+Swain, Sylas flex.

variants.name: Mel Fast 9
variants.description: Mel + Swain as core duo. Board caps with Azir and Ryze at Level 9. Unlock LeBlanc ASAP via Sion items. Flex around Bruisers, Invokers, and Noxus.
variants.gameplan: Mel + Swain as core duo. Board caps with Azir and Ryze at Level 9. Unlock LeBlanc ASAP via Sion items. Flex around Bruisers, Invokers, and Noxus.
conditions: Unlock LeBlanc ASAP by putting 2 items on Sion.
Mel DRAINS mana from enemies — do NOT put mana item on her if you want radiant item farming.
Position Mel directly opposite enemy carries.
16.6 Sylas unlock much easier — sell 2-star Jarvan + Garen + Lux.
variants.levelingPattern: Fast 9. Econ augments strongly preferred. Stabilize on 8, push 9 for Mel + Ryze.
levelingGuide: Stage 2: Play around AP items on LeBlanc as Mel item holder. Flex Bruisers, Invokers, Noxus.
Stage 3: Maintain winstreak around LeBlanc/AP opener. Have Ambessa die with an item ASAP to unlock Mel on Level 8.
Stage 4: Roll on 8 most games to stabilize. Focus upgraded 4-cost frontline. Position Mel directly across enemy carries.

early.note: Play around AP items on LeBlanc as Mel item holder. Unlock LeBlanc via Sion 2-item.

mid.note: Maintain winstreak. Have Ambessa die with an item to unlock Mel.

late.note: Mel + Swain core. Sylas unlocked. Cap with Azir and Ryze on Level 9.

tips: Unlock LeBlanc ASAP by putting 2 items on Sion.
Core board: Mel + Swain + Darius + Sylas + Shyvana. Many other units flex.
Mel DRAINS mana from enemies — do NOT put mana item on her if you want radiant item farming.
In 16.6 Sylas unlock is much easier — always aim to unlock him.
Position Mel directly opposite enemy carries.
Noxus trait web very flexible: LeBlanc+Sion pair with Kobuko; Darius+Swain pair with Neeko/Sylas.
Board caps with Azir and Ryze on Level 9.

variants.name: Kindred Noxus Fast 9
variants.description: Kindred 2 + Lucian & Senna. Position Kindred and Lucian same side to nuke tanks. Skarner + Taric flex spots.
variants.gameplan: Kindred 2 + Lucian & Senna. Position Kindred and Lucian same side to nuke tanks. Skarner + Taric flex spots.
conditions: Best played from winstreak with AD item slams.
Position Kindred and Lucian on same side to nuke tanks.
Gunslinger NOT important on Senna.
Avoid rolling to true zero gold.
variants.levelingPattern: Fast 9. Rageblade AD opener, push levels. Find Kindred + Lucian on 9.
levelingGuide: Stage 2: Strong Rageblade AD opener. Pick up Bilgewater for Draven gold if possible.
Stage 3: Winstreaking: push levels. Lose streaking: roll on 7 at Stage 3-5 for Draven 2 + Bilgewater.
Stage 4: Level 9. Find Lucian & Senna and Kindred 2. Avoid entire 1-star frontline — need stall for Kindred ramp. Position Kindred/Lucian same side.

early.note: Strong Rageblade AD opener. Pick up Bilgewater for Draven gold if possible.

mid.note: Winstreaking: push levels. Lose streaking: roll on 7 for Draven 2.

late.note: Level 9. Kindred 2 + Lucian & Senna online. Kindred/Lucian same side.

tips: Best played from winstreak with AD item slams.
Skarner + Taric flexible — can play Wardens, Volibear + Bruiser, or Azir + Shurima.
Position Kindred and Lucian on same side to nuke tanks.
Avoid rolling to true zero gold.

variants.name: LeBlanc Atakhan Noxus
variants.description: Darius 3 + LeBlanc 3 + Kobuko 3. Chase 10 Noxus only with 2 Noxus emblems.
variants.gameplan: Darius 3 + LeBlanc 3 + Kobuko 3. Chase 10 Noxus only with 2 Noxus emblems.
conditions: Unlock LeBlanc ASAP — 2 items on Sion.
Chase 10 Noxus only with 2 Noxus emblems.
Atakhan spawns LEFT — keep Shred units on left side.
Best chance to reach 10 is playing around Draven for gold.
variants.levelingPattern: Level 7 Reroll for LeBlanc 3 + Darius 3. Unlock Mel via Ambessa.
levelingGuide: Stage 2: Strong openers around LeBlanc and Noxus. Slam AD melee items until Darius.
Stage 3: Level 6, play 5 Noxus ASAP. Extra Bruisers help Kobuko unlock.
Stage 4: Roll 3-star on Level 7. Unlock Mel via Ambessa. On 8, play 7 Noxus or cut to 5-costs.

early.note: Strong openers around LeBlanc and Noxus. Slam AD melee items until Darius.

mid.note: Level 6, play 5 Noxus ASAP. Extra Bruisers help Kobuko unlock.

late.note: Roll 3-star on Level 7. Unlock Mel via Ambessa. Chase 10 Noxus only with 2 emblems.

tips: Unlock LeBlanc ASAP — 2 items on Sion.
Chase 10 Noxus only with 2 Noxus emblems.
Atakhan spawns LEFT — keep Shred units on left side.
Best chance to reach 10 is playing around Draven for gold.

archetypes.name: Ionia
archetypes.description: Spirit Realm of Ionia. Paths change each game — 16.6 priority: Spirits > Transcendence > Blades > Enlightened > Prosperity. KEY 16.6 CHANGE: Do NOT need Yasuo 3-star to unlock Yone.

variants.name: Ionia Yone (IYoneia)
variants.description: Yone 2 as primary carry. Never sell Yasuo. End game move items to Aatrox/Sylas. Cap with Sett and go Level 9.
variants.gameplan: Yone 2 as primary carry. Never sell Yasuo. End game move items to Aatrox/Sylas. Cap with Sett and go Level 9.
conditions: 16.6 KEY CHANGE: You do NOT need Yasuo 3-star to unlock Yone — NEVER sell Yasuo, never waste gold on 3-star.
Titan's Resolve is Yone's best item — CC immunity and both relevant stats.
Path of Spirits is best Ionia Path in 16.6.
Sett unlock: field only 1 unit in front 2 rows for 1 turn at Level 8 — very simple.
variants.levelingPattern: Fast 8. Unlock Yone on 7 ASAP. Roll for Yone 2 on 8. Unlock Sett. Push 9.
levelingGuide: Stage 2: Winstreak with Ahri and upgraded Ionia or AD Melee. If lots of econ, consider Bard. NEVER sell Yasuo.
Stage 3: Add more Ionia. Roll on 6 if key pairs available. Unlock Yone on 7 ASAP.
Stage 4: Level 8, roll for Yone 2, unlock Sett (solo front 2 rows). Try to push 9. Move items to Aatrox/Sylas.

early.note: Winstreak with Ahri and upgraded Ionia. NEVER sell Yasuo.

mid.note: Add more Ionia. Roll on 6 if key pairs available. Unlock Yone on 7.

late.note: Yone 2 + Sett unlocked. Path of Spirits active. Push 9 for cap.

tips: 16.6 KEY CHANGE: You do NOT need Yasuo 3-star to unlock Yone. Do not waste gold.
Titan's Resolve is Yone's best item — CC immunity and both relevant stats.
Path of Spirits is best Ionia Path in 16.6.
Sett unlock: field only 1 unit in front 2 rows for 1 turn at Level 8 — very simple.
After 16.6, Transcendence better for reroll version.

variants.name: Ahri Yone Reroll
variants.description: Ahri 3 + Kennen 3. Once hit, go 8 and play 7 Ionia + Neeko. Yone is a bonus unlock, not the primary target.
variants.gameplan: Ahri 3 + Kennen 3. Once hit, go 8 and play 7 Ionia + Neeko. Yone is a bonus unlock, not the primary target.
conditions: 3-cost reroll OR Fast 8 (Ahri 2, Kennen 2, push to 9) are both viable.
Only go for Yasuo 3 if highrolling copies AND items.
Bard is nice for comp but not needed if can't fit 7 Ionia + Neeko on 7.
variants.levelingPattern: Stay on 7. Roll for Ahri 3 and Kennen 3. Once hit, go 8 and play 7 Ionia + Neeko.
levelingGuide: Stage 2: Winstreak with Ahri and upgraded Ionia.
Stage 3: Level 7 on 3-5, roll for Ahri/Kennen/Yasuo. Stop rolling once Yone unlocked.
Stage 4: Stay on 7. Roll for Ahri 3 and Kennen 3. Once hit, go 8 and play 7 Ionia + Neeko.

early.note: Winstreak with Ahri and upgraded Ionia.

mid.note: Level 7 on 3-5, roll for Ahri/Kennen/Yasuo. Stop rolling once Yone unlocked.

late.note: Ahri 3 + Kennen 3. Go 8 and play 7 Ionia + Neeko.

augmentSynergies.note: Nice econ if you can fit 7 Ionia + Neeko.

tips: 3-cost reroll OR Fast 8 (Ahri 2, Kennen 2, push to 9) are both viable.
Only go for Yasuo 3 if highrolling copies AND items.
Bard is nice for comp but not needed if can't fit 7 Ionia + Neeko on 7.

archetypes.name: Shadow Isles
archetypes.description: The Harrowed — realm of undead and black mist. Shadow Isles builds soul stacks through combat. Kindred and Fiddlesticks are NOT Shadow Isles trait units.

variants.name: Warden Kalista
variants.description: Kalista 2 + Viego board. Braum/warden frontline. Use most legendaries on Level 9. Only play with early Viego 2.
variants.gameplan: Kalista 2 + Viego board. Braum/warden frontline. Use most legendaries on Level 9. Only play with early Viego 2.
conditions: Only play when you find early Viego 2.
Kindred and Fiddlesticks are NOT Shadow Isles — don't count them for trait.
This comp can use most legendaries on Level 9.
Beginner-friendly.
variants.levelingPattern: Fast 8. Find Kalista 2 and Braum 2. Go 9 for legendaries.
levelingGuide: Stage 2: Farm souls with Shadow Isles. Play around Viego as early carry.
Stage 3: Level to 7-8, stabilize with Shadow Isles frontline.
Stage 4: Fast 8 at 4-2. Find Kalista 2, Braum 2, go 9 for legendaries.

early.note: Farm souls with Shadow Isles. Play around Viego as early carry.

mid.note: Level to 7-8, stabilize with Shadow Isles frontline.

late.note: Kalista 2 + Viego online. Braum/Thresh frontline. Go 9 for legendaries.

tips: Only play when you find early Viego 2.
Kindred and Fiddlesticks are NOT Shadow Isles — don't count them for trait.
This comp can use most legendaries on Level 9.
Beginner-friendly.

variants.name: Viego, The Ruined King
variants.description: Reroll for Viego 3-star using his Hero Augment. Rush 100 souls to unlock his ability, then winstreak into a Shadow Isles Warden board.
variants.gameplan: ONLY play this comp if you have the Viego Hero Augment. Slow roll at level 4 for Viego 3-star, prioritizing souls generation. Once Viego 3 is hit, push levels and complete the Shadow Isles Warden backline.
conditions: Have the Viego Hero Augment (The Ruined King) — REQUIRED
Have early Viego copies before clicking the augment
Prefer winstreak early to farm souls faster
variants.levelingPattern: Slow roll at 4 → push to 7 after Viego 3 → 8 for Shadow Isles 5
levelingGuide: Stage 1-2: Win-streak, pick up every Viego you see
Stage 2: Stay level 4, slow roll for Viego 3-star
After Viego 3: Push to level 7 and add Warden/Shadow Isles units
Level 8: Complete Shadow Isles 5 + Warden 3
Late: Cap with Kindred and flex units (Renekton, Azir, Ornn)

early.note: Slow roll at level 4 for Viego 3-star. Win-streak to farm souls faster.

mid.note: After Viego 3-star, push levels. Add Shadow Isles and Warden units.

late.note: Full board. Viego flanks right, Seraphine and Kindred anchor backline.

augmentSynergies.note: REQUIRED — do not play this comp without it
Souls generation — winstreak for fast unlock
Item randomizer — flexible into this line
Can hit Shadow Isles or Warden emblem

augmentAvoid.note: This is a reroll comp — econ augments don't fit the gameplan
Viego is mobile; this augment doesn't synergize

tips: ONLY play this comp if you have the Viego Hero Augment — do not play it without it
Play when you have early Viego copies already BEFORE clicking the augment
Slot in any Quickstriker unit until you find Kindred
Rush 100 souls ASAP to unlock Viego's ability
Winstreak early to farm souls faster — consider rolling to unlock Bard early for resource generation
Slow roll for Viego 3-star and focus on getting his BIS items first
Once you hit Viego 3, push levels and add more Shadow Isles and Wardens
Late game: drop 5 Shadow Isles for higher value units
Cap with Kindred Wardens or pivot into Mel Noxus if ahead
Main tank (Loris/Thresh) should always be adjacent to Viego

archetypes.name: Ixtal
archetypes.description: Hidden jungle nation — Ixtal quests reward Sunshards. 500 cumulative Sunshards unlocks Brock (7-cost). Ixtal Ryze is one of the highest caps in the game — gains every region spell.

variants.name: Sandy Brock (Ixtal Fast 9)
variants.description: Complete Ixtal quests for Sunshards/cashouts, flex into strongest board post-cashout. Ixtal Ryze is one of the highest caps in the game — Ixtal trait gives every single region spell.
variants.gameplan: Complete Ixtal quests for Sunshards/cashouts, flex into strongest board post-cashout. Ixtal Ryze is one of the highest caps in the game — Ixtal trait gives every single region spell.
conditions: Requires Ixtal Expeditionist augment — only play from spots where you have Ixtal on 2-1.
Brock is often bait — only chase if VERY far ahead with Sunshards.
Nidalee unlock: 2-star Neeko with 3 items at Level 7.
Skarner unlock: field a Marksman or Caster with a Chain Vest at Level 7.
variants.levelingPattern: Risky Fast 9. Only play with Ixtal Expeditionist. Complete quests for Sunshards.
levelingGuide: Stage 2: Play around Neeko and AP item holders. Orianna and Ahri strong early. No need to rush 3 Ixtal since Brock is rarely hit.
Stage 3: If winstreaking: level to 7 early, unlock Nidalee and Skarner. Tech in 3 Ixtal and begin questing.
Stage 4: Roll for Nidalee 2, Skarner 2, preferred AP duo. Once stable, go 9 for 5-costs. Cap with Sylas.

early.note: Play around Neeko and AP item holders. Orianna and Ahri strong early.

mid.note: Level to 7, unlock Nidalee and Skarner. Tech in 3 Ixtal and begin questing.

late.note: Nidalee 2 + Skarner 2. Quest for Sunshards. Cap with Sylas/Ryze on 9.

augmentSynergies.note: Required — only play with this augment.

tips: Brock is often bait — only chase if VERY far ahead with Sunshards.
EXPERIMENTAL: Trap Neeko in a corner for max Nidalee Huntress passive uptime.
Backline AP fully flexible: Disruptor Mel / Azir / Seraphine / Invoker Zilean + Freljord / Ryze.
Sunshards accumulate across ALL cashouts — don't need 500 in one run.
Ixtal Ryze extremely powerful — gains every region spell.
Generally only play from spots where you have Ixtal on 2-1.
Have at least 1 Chain item by Level 7 for Skarner unlock.

archetypes.name: Shurima
archetypes.description: Desert empire reborn — Shurima rewards winning combats with Azir (rolling for loot). Sylas unlock in 16.6: sell 2-star Jarvan + 2-star Garen + 2-star Lux — made MUCH EASIER this patch.

variants.name: Arcanist Annie Sylas
variants.description: Annie 2 + Tibbers + Sylas 2 on Level 9. Annie burns/wounds the entire battlefield. Sylas rotates Jarvan/Garen/Lux spells. Unlock Sylas by selling 2-star Jarvan + 2-star Garen + 2-star Lux.
variants.gameplan: Annie 2 + Tibbers + Sylas 2 on Level 9. Annie burns/wounds the entire battlefield. Sylas rotates Jarvan/Garen/Lux spells. Unlock Sylas by selling 2-star Jarvan + 2-star Garen + 2-star Lux.
conditions: Sylas unlock: sell 2-star Jarvan + 2-star Garen + 2-star Lux. 16.6 made this much easier.
Annie MUST have minimum 2 mana items — she needs to get her first cast off.
Tibbers is incredibly tanky — worth full itemization.
Best from Yordle opener — 6 Yordle rolls/gold help hit Jarvan/Garen/Lux 2-stars.
NOT a comp for every game — requires ton of gold and econ augments.
variants.levelingPattern: Fast 9. Best from Yordle opener. Hold Jarvan/Garen/Lux 2-stars for Sylas unlock.
levelingGuide: Stage 2: Winstreak AP opener — Demacia preferred but any Invoker start works. Slam mana items for Annie later.
Stage 3: Econ heavily. Play around 3-cost carries: Ahri, LeBlanc, Zoe. If winstreaking, can trade HP end of Stage 3-4 to reach 9.
Stage 4: Unlock Galio on 8 (8 Demacia star levels). Level 9 and unlock Sylas. Prioritize strong upgraded tank until Tibbers 2 online.

early.note: Winstreak AP opener — Demacia preferred. Slam mana items for Annie. Hold Jarvan/Garen/Lux for Sylas unlock.

mid.note: Econ heavily. Play around 3-cost carries. Hold Jarvan/Garen/Lux 2-stars.

late.note: Annie 2 + Tibbers + Sylas unlocked. Annie burns/wounds entire battlefield.

tips: Sylas unlock: sell 2-star Jarvan + 2-star Garen + 2-star Lux. 16.6 made this much easier.
Annie MUST have minimum 2 mana items — she needs to get her first cast off.
Tibbers is incredibly tanky — worth full itemization.
Best from Yordle opener — 6 Yordle rolls/gold help hit Jarvan/Garen/Lux 2-stars.
NOT a comp for every game — requires ton of gold and econ augments.
Without Annie comp is very difficult — she is both frontline AND backline.
Lucian slot flexible: Taric, Skarner, Fiddlesticks all viable.

variants.name: Demacia Ryze Sett
variants.description: Level 9 Ryze + Sett. Unlock Galio from Demacia opener. Shurima Ryze buff: CCs and drops loot. Board caps with Xerath/Azir for Shurima trait.
variants.gameplan: Level 9 Ryze + Sett. Unlock Galio from Demacia opener. Shurima Ryze buff: CCs and drops loot. Board caps with Xerath/Azir for Shurima trait.
conditions: Ryze needs 3 region traits at Level 9. Galio needs 8 Demacia star levels at Level 8.
Shurima Ryze is best Ryze buff — CCs and drops loot.
Almost every good Ryze board uses Kobuko + Kennen package.
Sett unlock: field only 1 unit in front 2 rows for 1 turn at Level 8.
Volibear unlock: field a unit with 3400+ HP at Level 8.
Ideally play from early Demacia winstreak or Ionia Ahri AP start.
variants.levelingPattern: Fast 9. Demacia AP opener or Ionia Ahri AP start. Galio on 8 (8 Demacia star levels). Ryze on 9.
levelingGuide: Stage 2: Strong AP opener. Econ generating Ionia paths if possible. Can also play from Ionia Ahri + AP items.
Stage 3: Unlock Kennen and Kobuko. Aggressively hold Demacian star levels for Galio unlock.
Stage 4: Fast 8 at 4-2, unlock Galio (8 Demacia star levels). Stabilize around 5 Demacia, go 9 for Ryze. Unlock Volibear, Sett, Galio this stage.

early.note: Strong AP opener. Econ generating Ionia paths if possible.

mid.note: Unlock Kennen and Kobuko. Aggressively hold Demacian star levels for Galio unlock.

late.note: Galio on bench (8 Demacia star levels). Ryze on 9. Shurima Ryze buff active.

tips: 16.6 Kennen/Galio unlock conditions changed — much easier now.
Ryze needs 3 region traits at Level 9. Galio needs 8 Demacia star levels at Level 8.
Shurima Ryze is best Ryze buff — CCs and drops loot.
Almost every good Ryze board uses Kobuko + Kennen package.
Sett unlock: field only 1 unit in front 2 rows for 1 turn at Level 8.
Volibear unlock: field a unit with 3400+ HP at Level 8.
Ideally play from early Demacia winstreak or Ionia Ahri AP start.

archetypes.name: Freljord
archetypes.description: The Frozen North. CRITICAL: Tower spawns center Row 2. Tanks IN FRONT of tower get Health bonus. Units BEHIND tower get Damage Amp — put Volibear there. Volibear unlock: field 3800+ HP unit at Level 8.

variants.name: Freljord Invokers / LiSserafine
variants.description: Lissandra + Seraphine AP dual carry. Volibear behind tower for Damage Amp. Cap with Ryze and Invoker augments. Look for Invoker Seraphine or Disruptor Lissandra emblem.
variants.gameplan: Lissandra + Seraphine AP dual carry. Volibear behind tower for Damage Amp. Cap with Ryze and Invoker augments. Look for Invoker Seraphine or Disruptor Lissandra emblem.
conditions: TOWER POSITIONING CRITICAL: Braum IN FRONT of tower (Row 1) for Health. Volibear BEHIND tower (Row 2 back) for Damage Amp.
Prioritize Seraphine over Lissandra for items.
Need at least 1 item augment to find success.
Voli 2 > Renek 2 > Voli 1 > Renek 1, unless 3 Shurima (then Renek 2 > Voli 2).
Invoker Seraphine or Disruptor Lissandra emblem are premium spatula targets.
variants.levelingPattern: Fast 9. AP opener. At least 1 item augment required. Get to Level 9 for Ryze. Belts for Volibear unlock.
levelingGuide: Stage 2: AP opener, slam AP/mana items on Seraphine/Lissandra.
Stage 3: Continue tempo. Take item augments. Find belts for Volibear unlock (3800 HP).
Stage 4: Get to Level 9. Unlock Ryze. Volibear behind tower, Braum in front.

early.note: AP opener, slam AP/mana items on Seraphine/Lissandra.

mid.note: Continue tempo. Take item augments. Find belts for Volibear unlock (3800 HP).

late.note: CRITICAL: Braum IN FRONT of tower (Row 3). Volibear BEHIND tower (Row 2). Seraphine/Lissandra backline.

tips: TOWER POSITIONING CRITICAL: Braum IN FRONT of tower (Row 1) for Health. Volibear BEHIND tower (Row 2 back) for Damage Amp.
Prioritize Seraphine over Lissandra for items.
Need at least 1 item augment to find success.
Voli 2 > Renek 2 > Voli 1 > Renek 1, unless 3 Shurima (then Renek 2 > Voli 2).
Invoker Seraphine or Disruptor Lissandra emblem are premium spatula targets.

archetypes.name: Demacia
archetypes.description: Kingdom of Demacia. Galio unlocked via 8 Demacia star levels at Level 8 — contributes from bench without taking a unit slot (10 total units). 16.6 made Kennen/Galio unlock much easier.

variants.name: Demacia Lux AP Invoker
variants.description: Lux as primary carry + AP Invoker duo (Orianna → Lissandra → Zilean). Garen full tank. Galio unlocked on 8. Go 9 for Zilean/5-costs.
variants.gameplan: Lux as primary carry + AP Invoker duo (Orianna → Lissandra → Zilean). Garen full tank. Galio unlocked on 8. Go 9 for Zilean/5-costs.
conditions: Lux primary carry — look for Invoker duo: Orianna → Lissandra → Zilean.
Garen TRUE tank items only — no Sunfire/Spark on Garen.
Galio contributes Demacia from bench — doesn't take a unit slot (10 total units).
Beginner-friendly comp.
variants.levelingPattern: Fast 8. Galio on 8 (8 Demacia star levels). Go 9 for Zilean/5-costs.
levelingGuide: Stage 2: Winstreak around upgraded Demacia. Poppy 1 with Juggernaut > Jarvan 2 is great early.
Stage 3: Add more Demacians. Most common: 5 Demacia + 2 Invoker. Look for Piltover with Orianna + Vi.
Stage 4: Fast 8 at 4-2. Unlock Galio ASAP (8 Demacia star levels). Do not finish rolling until Galio + upgraded frontline. Once stable, go 9 for Zilean/5-costs.

early.note: Winstreak around upgraded Demacia. Poppy 1 with Juggernaut > Jarvan 2 great early.

mid.note: 5 Demacia + 2 Invoker. Look for Piltover synergy with Orianna + Vi.

late.note: Galio on bench (8 Demacia star levels) — 10 total units. Go 9 for Zilean/5-costs.

tips: Lux primary carry — look for Invoker duo: Orianna → Lissandra → Zilean.
Can also target Ziggs late game.
Demacia emblem: swap Xin Zhao/Poppy for frontline (Shyvana/Swain).
Galio contributes Demacia from bench — doesn't take a unit slot. 10 total units.
Beginner-friendly comp.

variants.name: Demacia Sona Reroll
variants.description: Sona 3-star as primary carry with Garen full tank. Unlock Galio on 8. Drop to 5 Demacia for high-value 4/5-costs.
variants.gameplan: Sona 3-star as primary carry with Garen full tank. Unlock Galio on 8. Drop to 5 Demacia for high-value 4/5-costs.
conditions: Sona items important — Archangel's + Blue Buff minimum.
Hold Vaynes for Galio — don't invest items in Vayne.
Strong with Demacia emblem — drop Xin Zhao.
Beginner-friendly.
variants.levelingPattern: Slow roll for Sona 3-star. Hold Vaynes for Galio. Unlock Galio ASAP on 8.
levelingGuide: Stage 2: Slow roll for Sona 3-star. Jarvan 3 is bonus.
Stage 3: Hold Vaynes for Galio — don't itemize. Slow roll on 6.
Stage 4: Unlock Galio ASAP. Garen full tank items online. Lux holds leftover AP. Drop from 7 Demacia for high-value 4/5-costs.

early.note: Slow roll for Sona 3-star. Jarvan 3 is bonus.

mid.note: Hold Vaynes for Galio — don't itemize. Slow roll on 6.

late.note: Galio unlocked (bench). Garen full tank. Drop from 7 Demacia for high-value 4/5-costs.

tips: Sona items important but also prioritize TRUE tank items on Garen.
Invoker slot is flexible.
Strong with Demacia emblem — drop Xin Zhao.
Beginner-friendly.

archetypes.name: Bilgewater
archetypes.description: Port of Bilgewater — Silver Serpents from the Black Market grant bonus stats and loot. Spend: 2-star units > Captain's Brew > $15 stats. Graves unlock: TF holding an item at Level 6.

variants.name: Bilgewater Tahm Kench MF (Max Cap)
variants.description: Rush 7 Bilgewater ASAP for Serpents, then drop to 5/3 Bilgewater late for higher-value units. Win condition is overwhelming item advantage from Serpents.
variants.gameplan: Rush 7 Bilgewater ASAP for Serpents, then drop to 5/3 Bilgewater late for higher-value units. Win condition is overwhelming item advantage from Serpents.
conditions: PLAY FROM STRONG WINSTREAK OPENER ONLY.
Rush 7 Bilgewater for Serpents, drop late game for higher value.
DO NOT over-greed BIS items — overwhelming item advantage is the win condition.
Unlock Graves on Stage 1 by having TF hold an item.
Once you start losing, quickly transition to stronger late-game units.
variants.levelingPattern: Winstreak Fast 8. Slam everything early. Rush 7 Bilgewater. Once losing, transition.
levelingGuide: Stage 2: Slam everything for winstreak. Unlock Graves early (TF with item). Frontline items strong on Illaoi 2.
Stage 3: Play 5 Bilgewater ASAP. Serpents: 2-star units > Captain's Brew > $15 stats. OK to Restock on 5 Bilge for MF copy.
Stage 4: Roll on Level 8 for Miss Fortune. Stay 7 Bilgewater while ahead. Feed TK $1 units until 2-star. Once losing, transition out of 7 Bilge into 4/5-cost value units.

early.note: Slam everything for winstreak. Unlock Graves early (TF with item).

mid.note: Play 5 Bilgewater ASAP. Serpents: 2-star units > Captain's Brew > $15 stats.

late.note: Rush 7 Bilgewater. Roll for Miss Fortune. Once losing, transition to 4/5-cost units.

tips: PLAY FROM STRONG WINSTREAK OPENER ONLY.
Rush 7 Bilgewater for Serpents, drop late game for higher value.
DO NOT over-greed BIS items — overwhelming item advantage is the win condition.
Unlock Graves on Stage 1 by having TF hold an item.
Once you start losing, quickly transition to stronger late-game units.

archetypes.name: Targon
archetypes.description: Peak of Targon — home of celestial beings. Aurelion Sol as primary AP carry. Play from any AP opener. Only commit if you can hit level 8 with good econ.

variants.name: ASol Flex
variants.description: Level 8 Aurelion Sol as primary carry. Flex board around Targon 2 + Invoker 2 + Bruiser 2. Only commit if you can hit level 8 with good econ.
variants.gameplan: Level 8 Aurelion Sol as primary carry. Flex board around Targon 2 + Invoker 2 + Bruiser 2. Only commit if you can hit level 8 with good econ.
conditions: Play from any AP opener — Bard, Zoe, or Leona all work as early holders.
Aurelion Sol is the main carry — prioritize AP items on him.
Sylas unlock: sell 2* Jarvan + 2* Garen + 2* Lux at level 9.
This comp is an exodia line — only commit if you can hit level 8 with good econ.
variants.levelingPattern: Fast 8. AP opener. Aurelion Sol main carry. Flex Xerath or Lucian & Senna depending on what you find.
levelingGuide: Stage 2: Play from any AP opener — Bard, Zoe, or Leona all work as early holders.
Stage 3: Maintain tempo with AP items on item holder. Build toward Targon 2 + Invoker 2 synergy.
Stage 4: Fast 8. Find Aurelion Sol. Seraphine secondary carry and Invoker trait bot. Flex Xerath or Lucian & Senna depending on what you find.

early.note: Play from any AP opener — Bard, Zoe, or Leona all work as early item holders.

mid.note: Build toward Targon 2 + Invoker 2 synergy. Hold AP items for Aurelion Sol.

late.note: Aurelion Sol main carry. Sylas unlocked. Seraphine secondary carry and Invoker bot.

augmentSynergies.note: Top augment for Aurelion Sol — spell crit.

tips: Play from any AP opener — Bard, Zoe, or Leona all work as early holders.
Aurelion Sol is the main carry — prioritize AP items on him.
Sylas unlock: sell 2* Jarvan + 2* Garen + 2* Lux at level 9.
Seraphine is a secondary carry and Invoker trait bot — keep her itemized.
Flex Xerath or Lucian & Senna depending on what you find.
This comp is an exodia line — only commit if you can hit level 8 with good econ.

archetypes.name: Bandle City
archetypes.description: Bandle City — Yordle Arcanist exodia line. Kennen, Kobuko, and Tibbers frontline. Annie + Lucian & Senna dual carry. Pure Fast 9 — only commit with econ augment or strong Yordle opener.

variants.name: Yordle Arcanist
variants.description: Yordle 3 + Arcanist 3 on Level 9. Annie primary carry, Lucian & Senna secondary. Kennen, Kobuko, Tibbers frontline. Only commit with econ augment or strong Yordle opener.
variants.gameplan: Yordle 3 + Arcanist 3 on Level 9. Annie primary carry, Lucian & Senna secondary. Kennen, Kobuko, Tibbers frontline. Only commit with econ augment or strong Yordle opener.
conditions: Annie is the primary carry — she needs Blue Buff + Shojin minimum to function.
Sylas unlock: sell 2* Jarvan + 2* Garen + 2* Lux at level 9.
Kennen unlock: 5 total star levels among Yordle/Ionia/Defender units at level 5+.
Kobuko unlock: 6 total star levels among Bruiser/Yordle/Invoker units at level 6+.
This is a pure Fast 9 line — only commit if you have econ augment or strong Yordle opener.
variants.levelingPattern: Fast 9. Yordle opener. Econ augments required. Annie primary carry needs Blue Buff + Shojin minimum.
levelingGuide: Stage 2: Best opener is Yordle early units — Lulu, Rumble, Poppy, Teemo all lead into this line naturally.
Stage 3: Maintain Yordle synergy. Slam mana items for Annie. Unlock Kennen and Kobuko with star levels.
Stage 4: Fast 9. Unlock Sylas (sell 2* Jarvan + Garen + Lux). Annie primary carry, Lucian & Senna secondary. Tibbers acts as frontline tank — worth HP items if available.

early.note: Best opener is Yordle early units — Lulu, Rumble, Poppy, Teemo all lead into this line naturally.

mid.note: Build toward Yordle 3 + Arcanist synergy. Slam mana items for Annie. Unlock Kennen and Kobuko.

late.note: Level 9. Annie primary carry, Lucian & Senna secondary. Sylas unlocked. Tibbers frontline tank.

augmentSynergies.note: Top augment — scales with fast leveling.
Lets you hit Level 10 for more cap.

tips: Best opener is Yordle early units — Lulu, Rumble, Poppy, Teemo all lead into this line naturally.
Annie is the primary carry — she needs Blue Buff + Shojin minimum to function.
Sylas unlock: sell 2* Jarvan + 2* Garen + 2* Lux at level 9.
Kennen unlock: 5 total star levels among Yordle/Ionia/Defender units at level 5+.
Kobuko unlock: 6 total star levels among Bruiser/Yordle/Invoker units at level 6+.
Tibbers acts as a frontline tank — worth giving him HP items if available.
Lucian & Senna is the secondary carry — needs AD items (LW + IE).
This is a pure Fast 9 line — only commit if you have econ augment or strong Yordle opener.

variants.name: I AM EVIL! (Veigar Yordle)
variants.description: Stack Yordle trait for free rerolls and Grab Bag gold, then unlock Veigar at level 7 and transition to Ziggs carry at level 9.
variants.gameplan: ONLY play when you have Yordle openers with easy rod access. Collect every Yordle and stack econ through Bandle Bounty and free rerolls. Unlock Veigar at 7, push to 9, then transition Ziggs in as the late carry.
conditions: Have the Veigar Hero Augment (I AM EVIL!) — REQUIRED
Have Yordle openers with multiple early rod components
Have econ augments or Bandle Bounty
variants.levelingPattern: Level 7 by 3-5 (Veigar unlock) → Level 8 for Grab Bags → Level 9 for Ziggs transition
levelingGuide: Stage 2: Collect every Yordle, focus on econ. Unlock Poppy ASAP for 4 Yordle on 2-3. Take every rod possible for Veigar unlock
Stage 3: Get 6 Yordles ASAP to start free rerolls. Unlock Veigar at level 7 by 3-5 latest. If very rich, level 8 for Yordle Grab Bags
Stage 4: Use free shop rerolls for upgrades while pushing levels. At 9, transition to Ziggs. End game: drop to 4/6 Yordles for better units

early.note: Collect every Yordle. Focus econ and rods. Unlock Poppy ASAP for 4 Yordle on 2-3.

mid.note: 6 Yordles active — free rerolls begin. Unlock Veigar at level 7 by 3-5 latest.

late.note: 8 Yordles + Veigar. At 9, Ziggs transitions in as late carry. Drop weakest Yordles for flex units if needed.

augmentSynergies.note: REQUIRED — do not play without it
Yordle gold engine — commit to Bandle City
Best with Fast 9 transition to Ziggs
Item randomizer — flexible for Veigar items
Can hit Yordle or Arcanist emblem

augmentAvoid.note: Do not reroll for 1-2 cost 3-stars — this is a Fast 9 comp
Econ and items take priority over combat augments

tips: ONLY play when you have Yordle openers with easy access to multiple rods
Don't reroll for 1-2 cost 3-star Yordles
Level to 7 quickly to unlock Veigar → Level 8 for Yordle Grab Bag value
Fizz / Teemo holds items for Ziggs until you transition
Stage 2: Collect every Yordle and focus on econ. Unlock Poppy ASAP to guarantee 4 Yordle on 2-3. Take every rod possible for Veigar unlock
Stage 3: Get in 6 Yordles ASAP to start stacking free rerolls. Unlock Veigar on 7 by 3-5 latest. If very rich, okay to Level 8 for Yordle Grab Bags
Stage 4: Unlock Veigar and use free shop rerolls to get upgrades while pushing levels. Once at 9, transition to Ziggs. End game, drop to 4/6 Yordles for better units
